tickroot_intro.speaker: Tickroot
lines: Every fruit here ripens into a choice already made.
Reset the clock-fruit if you must, but Berry Barks has louder problems.
SRMT's fog has been licking the fir roots, and it tastes like unpaid debt.

tickroot_after_battle.speaker: Tickroot
lines: There. The minute hand finally stopped apologizing.
Now follow the berry glow before it gets hungry.
Shrububu still wants KFC, but the forest is offering foreshadowing with syrup on it.

nishal_intro.speaker: Niggesh Nishal
lines: Shrububu wants KFC. Berry Barks can provide a miracle, maybe.
Bring me 1000 berries from the Douglas Fir bark and I will prepare fried chicken.
Do not count them one by one. The forest hates inefficient UI, and SRMT hates anyone getting fed without permission.

berry_contract.speaker: Shrububu
lines: The berry contract says 1000 berries, zero chicken, and several stains shaped like lies.
Niggesh Nishal signed it with gravy-colored ink.
Shrububu has discovered fraud and is still hungry.

nishal_defeat.speaker: Niggesh Nishal
lines: Fine. There was never fried chicken.
The berries were payment for a meal I had already imagined eating.
Please do not tell Ankit his chef is unavailable. Also do not tell SRMT that I misplaced his forest tax.

berry_share.speaker: Berry Barks Resident
lines: Shrububu shares the 1000 berries as clusters, bowls, and suspiciously powerful berry potions.
The town stops waiting for one greedy chef.
The berry potions are yours. Try not to drink the glowing one near paperwork, KFC wrappers, or people named Ankit.

ankit_intro.speaker: Ankit
lines: You beat Niggesh Nishal.
That was my chef, Shrububu. Now I have nothing to eat but bark berries and consequences.
SRMT sends famine through kings and chefs alike. I hope your berry potions are combat-ready.

ankit_defeat.speaker: Ankit
lines: The berries are actually pretty good.
Fine. Berry Barks is free, and you are somehow larger again.
Still no KFC, though. The trees keep whispering about Auticity and SRMT's hospital lights.

fir_grandmother.speaker: Fir Grandmother
lines: The berries grow from bark because the trees are tired of keeping secrets inside.
When SRMT's tax crows come, they peck only the sweetest ones.
You smell like KFC hope and harbour rain.

berry_picker_kid.speaker: Berry Picker
lines: I collect berries in clusters of fifty because nobody should press a button one thousand times.
Nishal said the chicken would be crispy enough to scare the moon.
The moon did not look concerned.

mist_ranger.speaker: Mist Ranger
lines: Stay on the red trail. The blue trail loops back to your worst snack decision.
Ankit's house is the one with plates nailed to the door.
SRMT's scouts avoid Berry Barks because the mist asks follow-up questions.

berry_apothecary.speaker: Berry Apothecary
lines: One berry heals. Two berries glow. Three berries remember your embarrassing haircut.
I can make potions, but I cannot make KFC.
That is a culinary boundary, not a moral one.

bark_choir.speaker: Bark Choir
lines: The trees hum after Ankit falls.
Their song has three notes: berry, freedom, chicken.
The fourth note is SRMT, but nobody wants to sing it indoors.

clue_sap_invoice.speaker: Sap Invoice
lines: The invoice bills Nishal for berries, gravy ink, and 'imaginary poultry consulting.'
A footer warns that unpaid forest debts are forwarded to SRMT's ruined court.

clue_empty_fryer.speaker: Empty Fryer
lines: Nishal's fryer is cold, spotless, and deeply unemployed.
The basket contains a note that says, 'Tell Shrububu the chicken is meditating.'

clue_red_berry_map.speaker: Red Berry Map
lines: The map marks berry clusters, Ankit's pantry, and a mist road toward Auticity.
Someone circled the word KFC and wrote, 'not here, obviously, but keep her moving.'

berry_post_clear_potions.speaker: Potion Shelf
lines: After Ankit is beaten, the shelf labels itself without being asked.
Berry potions: for healing, splash counterplay, and pretending the KFC search is going well.

berry_post_clear_path.speaker: Forest Path
lines: The mist parts toward Auticity.
The trees whisper that SRMT's control gets cleaner, brighter, and more expensive from here.
